title: papaver dubium var. obtusifolium
intro: Papaver dubium var. obtusifolium, also known as the obtusifolium poppy or yellow poppy, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Papaver genus and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sedation and relieve anxiety, making it a potential treatment for insomnia and restlessness. The plant's extracts and preparations have been traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain, offering potential health benefits for individuals suffering from stress and discomfort. Herbal preparations of Papaver dubium var. obtusifolium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
